subcodes.first_line: The Most Exalted Pen proclaimeth: O 'Alí, render thanks unto the Beloved of all worlds, inasmuch as thou hast attained unto the sweet fragrances of the divine days [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم اعلی میفرماید یا علی شکر کن محبوب عالمیان را چه که بنفحات ایام الهی فائز
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @saddening another soul, @spiritual transformation, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
